allow: Bash(mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -i "kwallet\\|kde.*wallet" || rpm -qa 2>/dev/null | grep -i "kwallet\\|kde.*wallet" || echo "No KWallet packages found")
Bash(pkg-config --cflags --libs KF6Wallet 2>/dev/null || echo "KF6Wallet not found in pkg-config")
Bash(rpm -q kf6-kwallet-devel 2>/dev/null || echo "not installed"; ls /usr/include/KF6/KWallet/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no headers")

Bash(rpm -q extra-cmake-modules kf6-ki18n-devel kf6-kconfig-devel kf6-kwallet-devel libplasma-devel qt6-qtbase-devel qt6-qtdeclarative-devel qt6-qtmultimedia-devel qt6-qtspeech-devel whisper-cpp-devel whisper-devel gcc-c++ cmake 2>&1 | grep "not installed")
Bash(rpm -q qt6-qtbase-devel qt6-qtdeclarative-devel qt6-qtnetworkauth-devel gcc-c++ cmake 2>&1 | grep "not installed")
Bash(rm -rf build && mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr 2>&1)

Bash(cat ~/.gemini/oauth_creds.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat ~/.gemini/google_accounts.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k, type\(v\).__name__\) for k,v in \(d[0].items\(\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.items\(\)\)]" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cat ~/.gemini/oauth_creds.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('expiry:', d.get\('expiry_date'\)\); import time; print\('now_ms:', int\(time.time\(\)*1000\)\); print\('expired:', d.get\('expiry_date',0\) < int\(time.time\(\)*1000\)\)" 2>&1)
